_**Agent (claude-4.6-sonnet-medium)**_

---

## 全面检查报告

### 卡死根因（已找到 3 个主因）

**主因 1：无 `.cursorignore`，Cursor 索引了不该索引的内容** ✅ 已修复

Cursor 对整个 3185 个文件的项目无限制索引，其中包含：

| 问题目录/文件 | 大小/数量 | 影响 |
|---|---|---|
| `vault/.obsidian/plugins/copilot/` 的 `copilot-index-*.json` | **227MB × 2份** | 最大元凶，每次读取直接卡死 |
| `.smart-env/multi/` 的 ajson 索引 | **131个文件** | Cursor 无法读取却反复尝试 |
| `vault/数字分身/对话导出/` | **243个MD** | 访问时实测耗时 **85秒**（根因验证） |
| `.specstory/history/` 的超大MD | **2MB/1.7MB单文件** | 已有 `.cursorindexingignore`，但不彻底 |
| `知识库/vector_store/` | 二进制DB | Cursor 不能读二进制 |

**主因 2：根目录混乱，临时文件堆积** ✅ 已修复

根目录有 14 个 `temp_*` 临时文件、test脚本、error日志等，Cursor 每次启动都会扫描。

**主因 3：重复/废弃目录仍在项目内，未排除** ⚠️ 需要用户决策

| 目录 | 文件数 | 状态 |
|---|---|---|
| `数字分身-废弃/` | 28 | 交接备忘说用户手动重命名后可删 |
| `数字分身/` | 916 | 旧版，已迁移到 vault，但还在项目内 |
| `对话存档/` | 10 | 根目录下的旧存档 |

### 已完成的修复

1. **创建 `.cursorignore`** — 排除了 copilot索引、smart-env、向量库、废弃目录、对话导出、临时文件、二进制文件等
2. **删除 14 个临时文件** — 根目录清理完成

### 需要你确认的事（用户操作）

🔴 **废弃目录清理**：
- `数字分身-废弃/`（28个文件）——是否可以删除？
- `数字分身/`（916个文件）——是否已确认完全迁移到 vault，可以删除？
- `对话存档/`（10个对话文件）——这些文件在 vault 里有对应的吗？

**建议**：先确认这三个目录，确认后我帮你删。删完 + `.cursorignore` 生效后，Cursor 索引的文件数量会从 ~3000 降到 ~500 以下，卡死问题应该会消失。

**另外**：需要重启 Cursor 让 `.cursorignore` 生效。

{
  "markdown": "\u003e ## Documentation Index\n\u003e \n\u003e Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://specstory.mintlify.app/llms.txt\n\u003e Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.\n\n# Cursor\n\nSpecStory integrates seamlessly with [Cursor](https://cursor.com/). Cursor already helps developers move faster with inline edits, multi-line completions, and codebase chat. SpecStory adds the missing layer by capturing why the changes were made.\n\nWith SpecStory enabled, every AI conversation in Cursor is auto-saved as Markdown in your project. Your reasoning, tradeoffs, and design decisions live alongside your code: versioned, reusable, and shareable.\n\n## Install the SpecStory Extension\n\n1. Open Cursor.\n2. Go to Extensions Marketplace (&#96;Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+X&#96;).\n3. Search for SpecStory and click Install.\n4. Verify installation:\n\n- Open the Command Palette (&#96;Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+P&#96;).\n- Type &#96;SpecStory&#96;, the commands should appear.\n\nIf you install SpecStory directly from the [Visual Studio Marketplace](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=SpecStory.specstory-vscode) website, you may end up with VS Code having the extension but not Cursor. Always install directly from inside Cursor to avoid this issue.\n\n## Verify It Works\n\n- Start a chat with Cursor’s AI.\n- Open your project folder.\n- You should now see a new &#96;.specstory/history/&#96; directory.\n- Inside, you should see a Markdown file of your session, named with a timestamp.\n\nSpecStory is local-first by default. Nothing leaves your machine unless you explicitly share it.\n\n## How SpecStory Enhances Cursor\n\n- Auto-save: Every AI conversations in Cursor are automatically stored in &#96;.specstory/history/&#96; as clean Markdown.\n- Manual saves: From the Command Palette, run &#96;SpecStory: Save AI Chat History&#96; to cherry-pick and combine conversations.\n- Share conversations with a URL: Use &#96;SpecStory: Share AI Chat History&#96; to generate a private, anonymous link at &#96;share.specstory.com&#96;.\n\n- Derived rules for AI: SpecStory can extract project-level rules and custom instructions from your chats, feeding them back into Cursor to improve suggestions.\n\nRule derivation requires:\n\n- Auto-save enabled.\n- Signed-in SpecStory extension.\n\n## Best Practices for Cursor Users\n\n- Commit your history: Include &#96;.specstory/history/&#96; in your repo so teammates can review reasoning in PRs.\n- Use manual saves before big changes: Preserve the conversation context before accepting multi-line or agent-driven edits.\n- Leverage derived rules: Cursor’s [Project Rules](https://docs.cursor.com/context/rules-for-ai#project-rules-recommended) evolve automatically when SpecStory is active.\n\n## Why This Matters\n\nCursor accelerates what changes in your codebase. SpecStory ensures you never lose why those changes happened.\nTogether, they give you:\n\n- Faster debugging and onboarding\n- Traceable architectural decisions\n- Cleaner collaboration on AI-assisted code\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n- Extension mismatch: If VS Code shows SpecStory installed but Cursor doesn’t, uninstall and reinstall from Cursor’s built-in Marketplace.\n- No &#96;.specstory&#96; folder: Make sure you have an active project folder open. SpecStory only saves inside projects.\n- Still stuck? File an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/specstoryai/getspecstory/issues) or contact [support@specstory.com](mailto:support@specstory.com).\n\nBuilt with [Mintlify](https://mintlify.com/).",

}

This is located in different paths depending on your operating system:\n\n- Windows: &#96;%APPDATA%\\Cursor\\User\\globalStorage\\state.vscdb&#96;\n- MacOS: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\n- Linux: &#96;~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb&#96;\n\nFor GitHub Copilot, it reads your local chat history directly from chat jsons:\n\n- Windows: &#96;%APPDATA%\\Code\\User\\workspaceStorage\\{hash}\\chatSessions&#96;\n- MacOS: &#96;~/Library/Application Support/Code/User/workspaceStorage/{hash}/chatSessions&#96;\n- Linux: &#96;~/.config/Code/User/workspaceStorage/{hash}/chatSessions&#96;\n\nFor Claude Code, the SpecStory CLI wrapper acts as a launcher that:\n\n- Runs Claude Code while capturing your conversations\n- Reads session files from &#96;~/.claude/projects/&#96; (JSONL format)\n- Converts them to markdown and saves to &#96;.specstory/history/&#96; in your project\n- Works on macOS, Linux, and Windows\n\nFor more detail about each feature check out our feature pages. For insight into what data we collect and access look at [our data privacy page](https://specstory.mintlify.app/privacy).\n\n## If I need help how can I reach you?\n\nDon't be shy: we'd absolutely love to hear from you and promise to be extra responsive!\n\n1. Drop us a line at [support@specstory.com](mailto:support@specstory.com).\n2. We've talked about this internally but have not made a decision.\n\nWe do strive to be as open as possible in terms of how they work, what data is accessed and stored and [what our policy is](https://specstory.com/privacy).\n\n## Can I import my SpecStory history back into my editor?\n\nNot today. We do not conduct write operations on the &#96;state.vscdb&#96; or the [Shadow Workspace](https://www.cursor.com/blog/shadow-workspace) Cursor maintains. We do not modify the &#96;workspaceStorage&#96; directory Copilot maintains.\n\nYou can &#96;@&#96; reference (in Cursor) or &#96;#&#96; reference (Copilot) these files to provide context to your AI though!\n\nBuilt with [Mintlify](https://mintlify.com/).",

## 两个版本的根因

SpecStory **从 Cursor 的 sqlite3 数据库读取对话**（`state.vscdb`），然后自动保存为 `.specstory/history/` 里的 MD 文件。

你的 WF1 目前读的是 `.specstory/history/`，问题在于：

**SpecStory 会生成两种格式的文件名：**

| 格式 | 例子 | 来源 |
|---|---|---|
| 带秒数（完整时间戳） | `2026-03-17_06-00-54Z-复盘大脑op4.6.md` | SpecStory **自动保存**（auto-save） |
| 不带秒数（只到分钟） | `2026-03-17_06-00Z-复盘大脑op4-6.md` | WF1 **重命名节点**用 mtime 截断到分钟 |

**真正的重复机制**：WF1 读取 `.specstory/history/` 下的原始文件 → 重命名时把时间戳截断到分钟（`HHmm`）→ 生成了 `xxx-HHmmZ` 版本。但 SpecStory 原文件名本身就带秒数 `xxx-HH-mm-ssZ`。于是同一个对话在 `待确认/` 里出现了**两个文件**：
- 一个是 SpecStory 原始文件名（带秒，完整）
- 一个是 WF1 重命名后的（截到分钟，内容相同）

### 修复方案

**WF1 的"重命名节点"逻辑需要改**：检测到源文件名已包含秒数时间戳（`\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}_\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}Z`），**直接保留原始时间戳**，不再用 mtime 重新生成截断版本。

这是 WF1 的 Code 节点改动，你的意思是让我直接改 WF1 的 JSON，对吗？

---

_**User**_

马上改！要注意我们的逻辑是与对话导出做比对，我记不清楚了，对话导出有的WF1就不再提取，没有的就要提取，你看看逻辑

_**Agent (claude-4.6-sonnet-medium)**_

完整逻辑看清了。梳理一下现状和问题：

**现有流程：**
1. `SpecStory预清洗` — 读 `.specstory/history/` 里的文件，用 Python 清洗后输出到 `对话导出/`，文件名保持原样（带秒数，如 `2026-03-17_06-00-54Z-xxx.md`）
2. `重命名导出文件` — 给 `对话导出/` 里没有 `[导出]` 前缀的文件加前缀，同时用 **mtime 截断到分钟**，变成 `[导出] 2026-03-17-1920-2026-03-17_06-00-54Z-xxx.md`
3. `过滤未处理` — 对比 `对话导出/` 的文件 vs `待确认/`+`对话存档/`，没出现过的才往下走

**重复问题的根因：**

`SpecStory预清洗` 里的去重逻辑有个正则 bug：

```js
const m = ef.match(/^\[导出\]\s*\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4}-(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}_\d{2}-\d{2}Z-.+\.md)$/);
```

这个正则只能匹配**截到分钟**的旧版原始文件名（`_HH-mmZ`），但 SpecStory 新版生成的文件名**带秒数**（`_HH-mm-ssZ`），完全匹配不上，导致同一个对话被重复处理。

**修复方案**：把正则里的时间戳部分改为同时兼容带秒/不带秒两种格式。

---

## 修复内容

**根因**：SpecStory 新版文件名带秒（`_HH-mm-ssZ`），旧版不带秒（`_HHmmZ`）。WF1 的去重逻辑只认旧格式，新格式全部漏判 → 同一对话被重复处理 → 待确认目录出现两份。

**修改了2处**（均在 `SpecStory预清洗` 节点）：

1. **新增 `normalizeSpeName` 函数** — 把带秒版本统一转为不带秒版本，作为去重 key
2. **Set 存储时 normalize** — 两种情况（有无前缀）都先 normalize 再存入 Set
3. **比对时也 normalize** — `processedSpeNames.has(normalizeSpeName(f))` 而不是直接比对原文件名

**效果**：无论 SpecStory 生成的是 `_06-00Z` 还是 `_06-00-54Z`，都会被识别为同一个文件，不再重复清洗。

---

现在需要你**去 N8N 重新导入 WF1**（`N8N/01-A对话清洗标注.json`），因为 N8N 里的工作流是独立的，改 JSON 文件不会自动生效。

全貌清晰了。根因一目了然：

**WF1 每次触发都重新清洗全量文件，生成了多个批次：**
- `2026-03-18-2206` 批次（32个文件）
- `2026-03-21-1351` 批次（72个文件）
- `2026-03-22-2318` 批次（20个文件）
- `2026-03-23-1920` 批次（121个文件）
- `2026-03-23-2007` 批次（91个文件）
- `2026-03-23-2039` 批次（16个文件）

**每个批次的前缀时间戳不同，所以去重逻辑把它们全当新文件处理了。**

去重逻辑的 bug：`processedSpeNames` 只提取 SPE 原始文件名去重，但同一个 SPE 文件名可以出现在多个不同批次的 `[导出]` 文件里，每个批次前缀时间戳不同，所以被当成不同文件重复清洗。

**现在需要做两件事：**
1. **清理对话导出目录**——每个 SPE 文件只保留最新批次的版本，删除旧批次重复的
2. **清理待确认目录**——同理，每个对话只保留带秒数（内容完整）的版本，删除截断版

先写清理脚本：

_**Agent (claude-4.6-sonnet-medium)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: $script = @'
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
清理对话导出目录和待确认目录中的重复文件
逻辑：
  对话导出：同一个SPE核心文件名，只保留最新批次（[导出] 时间戳最大的），删除其余
  待确认：同一个对话，带秒版（_HH-mm-ssZ）内容更完整，保留；不带秒版删除
"""
import os, re, sys

EXPORT_DIR = r"D:\数字分身2\vault\数字分身\对话导出"
PENDING_DIR = r"D:\数字分身2\vault\数字分身\待确认"
DRY_RUN = "--dry-run" in sys.argv  # 加 --dry-run 只打印不删除

def normalize_spe_name(name):
    """把带秒的时间戳统一成不带秒，用于去重key"""
    return re.sub(r'(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}_\d{2}-\d{2})-\d{2}Z', r'\1Z', name)

# ============================================================
# 第一步：清理对话导出目录
# 每个SPE核心名只保留[导出]批次时间戳最新的那个
# ============================================================
print("=== 对话导出目录去重 ===")
export_files = [f for f in os.listdir(EXPORT_DIR) if f.endswith('.md')]

# 按SPE核心名分组，记录 {core_name: [(batch_ts, filename), ...]}
groups = {}
for f in export_files:
    # 匹配格式：[导出] YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM-<spe_name>.md
    m = re.match(r'^\[导出\]\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4})-(.*\.md)$', f)
    if not m:
        continue
    batch_ts = m.group(1)
    spe_name = m.group(2)
    core = normalize_spe_name(spe_name)
    if core not in groups:
        groups[core] = []
    groups[core].append((batch_ts, f))

export_deleted = 0
export_kept = 0
for core, versions in groups.items():
    if len(versions) <= 1:
        export_kept += 1
        continue
    # 按批次时间戳排序，保留最新的（最大值）
    versions.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    to_keep = versions[-1]  # 最新批次
    to_delete = versions[:-1]
    export_kept += 1
    for ts, fname in to_delete:
        fpath = os.path.join(EXPORT_DIR, fname)
        print(f"  删除旧批次: {fname}")
        if not DRY_RUN:
            os.remove(fpath)
        export_deleted += 1

print(f"对话导出：保留 {export_kept} 个，删除 {export_deleted} 个重复")

# ============================================================
# 第二步：清理待确认目录
# 同一对话，带秒版保留，不带秒版删除
# ============================================================
print("\n=== 待确认目录去重 ===")
pending_files = [f for f in os.listdir(PENDING_DIR) if f.endswith('.md')]

# 按normalize后的核心名分组
pending_groups = {}
for f in pending_files:
    core_f = re.sub(r'^\[待确认\]\s*', '', f)
    core = normalize_spe_name(core_f)
    if core not in pending_groups:
        pending_groups[core] = []
    pending_groups[core].append(f)

pending_deleted = 0
pending_kept = 0
for core, versions in pending_groups.items():
    if len(versions) <= 1:
        pending_kept += 1
        continue
    # 有多个版本：优先保留带秒的（文件名更长，时间戳更精确）
    has_seconds = [f for f in versions if re.search(r'_\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}Z', f)]
    no_seconds  = [f for f in versions if not re.search(r'_\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}Z', f)]
    if has_seconds:
        # 保留带秒版（取最新的），删除不带秒版
        to_keep = sorted(has_seconds)[-1]
        to_delete = no_seconds + [f for f in has_seconds if f != to_keep]
    else:
        # 全部不带秒：保留最新的
        to_keep = sorted(versions)[-1]
        to_delete = [f for f in versions if f != to_keep]
    pending_kept += 1
    for fname in to_delete:
        fpath = os.path.join(PENDING_DIR, fname)
        print(f"  删除重复: {fname}")
        if not DRY_RUN:
            os.remove(fpath)
        pending_deleted += 1

print(f"待确认：保留 {pending_kept} 个，删除 {pending_deleted} 个重复")
print(f"\n{'[DRY RUN - 未实际删除]' if DRY_RUN else '[已实际删除]'}")
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("C:\Users\Think\cleanup_dupes.py", $script, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
Write-Host "脚本写入完成"</summary>

```bash
$script = @'
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
"""
清理对话导出目录和待确认目录中的重复文件
逻辑：
  对话导出：同一个SPE核心文件名，只保留最新批次（[导出] 时间戳最大的），删除其余
  待确认：同一个对话，带秒版（_HH-mm-ssZ）内容更完整，保留；不带秒版删除
"""
import os, re, sys

EXPORT_DIR = r"D:\数字分身2\vault\数字分身\对话导出"
PENDING_DIR = r"D:\数字分身2\vault\数字分身\待确认"
DRY_RUN = "--dry-run" in sys.argv  # 加 --dry-run 只打印不删除

def normalize_spe_name(name):
    """把带秒的时间戳统一成不带秒，用于去重key"""
    return re.sub(r'(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}_\d{2}-\d{2})-\d{2}Z', r'\1Z', name)

# ============================================================
# 第一步：清理对话导出目录
# 每个SPE核心名只保留[导出]批次时间戳最新的那个
# ============================================================
print("=== 对话导出目录去重 ===")
export_files = [f for f in os.listdir(EXPORT_DIR) if f.endswith('.md')]

# 按SPE核心名分组，记录 {core_name: [(batch_ts, filename), ...]}
groups = {}
for f in export_files:
    # 匹配格式：[导出] YYYY-MM-DD-HHMM-<spe_name>.md
    m = re.match(r'^\[导出\]\s*(\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{4})-(.*\.md)$', f)
    if not m:
        continue
    batch_ts = m.group(1)
    spe_name = m.group(2)
    core = normalize_spe_name(spe_name)
    if core not in groups:
        groups[core] = []
    groups[core].append((batch_ts, f))

export_deleted = 0
export_kept = 0
for core, versions in groups.items():
    if len(versions) <= 1:
        export_kept += 1
        continue
    # 按批次时间戳排序，保留最新的（最大值）
    versions.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
    to_keep = versions[-1]  # 最新批次
    to_delete = versions[:-1]
    export_kept += 1
    for ts, fname in to_delete:
        fpath = os.path.join(EXPORT_DIR, fname)
        print(f"  删除旧批次: {fname}")
        if not DRY_RUN:
            os.remove(fpath)
        export_deleted += 1

print(f"对话导出：保留 {export_kept} 个，删除 {export_deleted} 个重复")

# ============================================================
# 第二步：清理待确认目录
# 同一对话，带秒版保留，不带秒版删除
# ============================================================
print("\n=== 待确认目录去重 ===")
pending_files = [f for f in os.listdir(PENDING_DIR) if f.endswith('.md')]

# 按normalize后的核心名分组
pending_groups = {}
for f in pending_files:
    core_f = re.sub(r'^\[待确认\]\s*', '', f)
    core = normalize_spe_name(core_f)
    if core not in pending_groups:
        pending_groups[core] = []
    pending_groups[core].append(f)

pending_deleted = 0
pending_kept = 0
for core, versions in pending_groups.items():
    if len(versions) <= 1:
        pending_kept += 1
        continue
    # 有多个版本：优先保留带秒的（文件名更长，时间戳更精确）
    has_seconds = [f for f in versions if re.search(r'_\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}Z', f)]
    no_seconds  = [f for f in versions if not re.search(r'_\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}Z', f)]
    if has_seconds:
        # 保留带秒版（取最新的），删除不带秒版
        to_keep = sorted(has_seconds)[-1]
        to_delete = no_seconds + [f for f in has_seconds if f != to_keep]
    else:
        # 全部不带秒：保留最新的
        to_keep = sorted(versions)[-1]
        to_delete = [f for f in versions if f != to_keep]
    pending_kept += 1
    for fname in to_delete:
        fpath = os.path.join(PENDING_DIR, fname)
        print(f"  删除重复: {fname}")
        if not DRY_RUN:
            os.remove(fpath)
        pending_deleted += 1

print(f"待确认：保留 {pending_kept} 个，删除 {pending_deleted} 个重复")
print(f"\n{'[DRY RUN - 未实际删除]' if DRY_RUN else '[已实际删除]'}")
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("C:\Users\Think\cleanup_dupes.py", $script, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
Write-Host "脚本写入完成"
```
